subcategory: animated button with loading and success states
use_cases: Call-to-action button with interactive hover animations and expanding dot effect
Form submission button with loading spinner and success feedback states
Async operation button that provides visual feedback during processing
ai_summary: An interactive hover button component featuring smooth animations with a dot that expands into a glow effect on hover, supporting idle, loading, and success states with fluid framer-motion transitions. Built with Tailwind CSS and designed for use in forms, CTAs, and action triggers.
